data.name: Hentai Girls Maid
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Girls Maid is an entertaining puzzle game. Assemble beautiful images by correctly putting together jigsaw pieces in this game, which unlock colorful and charming cute girls pictures .



The game features visually appealing and stunning girls. Swap puzzle pieces to progress through levels and unlock new characters. Enjoy the gratification of revealing the complete picture after each puzzle without any time limits.


This game provides addictive gameplay. With its straightforward and immersive mechanics, it delivers an experience you can enjoy for hours.

Features:

Captivating girls' images and soothing music.
Full-view mode available upon finishing each level.
Various levels with different difficulties for prolonged enjoyment.

data.short_description: Hentai Girls Maid is a puzzle game showcasing a variety of sexy and alluring girls. Dive into the jigsaw puzzle gameplay, where players move pieces to reassemble the original picture.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
